title: [ImportVerilog] Fixup case statements that look exhaustive but are not

features.name: case statement covering all 2-state values without default clause on 4-state signal
features.description: Code should include a case statement that enumerates all possible 2-state values of a 4-state logic signal but lacks a default or else clause to handle X/Z states

features.name: 4-state logic type in case expression
features.description: Code should include a 4-state logic signal with 2-state exhaustive case coverage used as a case expression
